CONDITIONAL NON-OPPOSITION OF DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 27561607) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-29-2009 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF ROBERT BOUCKE'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE/ PREFERENTIAL SETTING, GRANTED, PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 2/16/2010 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; PLAINTIFF TO CONTACT DEPT. 502 FORTHWITH FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATES. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. ALL MOTIONS EXCEPT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATIONS ARE TO BE NOTICED IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 11/30/09. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES AFTER THE DUE DATE THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT IDENTIFIED PREVIOUSLY. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL SUPPORT PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 12/21/09. IF DEFENDANTS LEARN OF NEW WITNESSES AND OR DOCUMENTS, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED PREVIOUSLY. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH CSR# 5162 (206)
